name: @hojai/cloud
description: Cloud SDK - Client for the HOJAI Cloud deploy service (port 4380). The deploy target for `npx hojai deploy --mode=remote`. Push projects, list deployments, tear down — the wildcard *.hojai.app routing layer.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc src/__tests__/index.test.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --declaration --outDir dist

author: HOJAI AI
